tests.name: plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged deduplicates additional file paths returned by matching plugins
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged matches wildcard plugins and file extensions case-insensitively while skipping non-matching files
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged requests a full refresh when a matching plugin only exposes pre-analysis hooks
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged does not request a refresh when a matching plugin has neither change nor pre-analysis hooks
plugin lifecycle notify/filesChanged continues after plugin change-hook failures and requests a full refresh
plugin lifecycle notify/readiness notifies every plugin map entry when readiness events are broadcast
plugin lifecycle notify/readiness swallows readiness hook failures for individual plugins
graph view analysis execution logs non-abort analysis failures and publishes an empty graph fallback
graph view analysis execution returns quietly for abort errors raised during analysis
graph view analysis execution refresh runs explicit full refresh through the analyzer refresh path
graph view analysis execution refresh falls back to analyzer analyze for full refreshes when refreshIndex is unavailable
graph view analysis execution refresh runs scoped incremental refresh through the changed-file analyzer path
graph view analysis execution refresh falls back to analyzer analyze when incremental refresh support is unavailable
graph view analysis execution refresh uses empty changed-file paths for incremental refreshes and falls back to the empty graph
graph view analysis execution refresh falls back to the empty graph when no refresh or analyze path is available
graph view analysis execution refresh falls back to the empty graph when no analyzer exists for a full refresh
graph view analysis execution refresh falls back to the empty graph when no analyzer exists for an incremental refresh
graph view analysis execution publish publishes an empty graph and index state
graph view analysis execution publish defaults empty graph publication to a missing index
graph view analysis execution publish publishes the transformed graph and notifies post-analyze hooks
graph view analysis execution publish publishes the transformed graph without post-analyze hooks when no analyzer is available
graph view analysis execution publish publishes an empty graph fallback with plugin state updates after failures
graph view analysis execution publish publishes an empty graph fallback when optional plugin broadcasts are absent
graph view analysis execution prepare returns before doing any work when the request is already stale
graph view analysis execution prepare publishes an empty graph when no analyzer exists
graph view analysis execution prepare stops when the request turns stale after initialization
graph view analysis execution prepare publishes an empty graph after group recompute when no workspace is available
graph view analysis execution prepare returns true after plugin activation, initialization, and group preparation succeed
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper runs the provider request flow and clears the active controller afterward
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper updates request state even when optional request update callbacks are absent
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper syncs analyzer initialization state after execution
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper forwards stale and abort checks through the provider wrappers
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper marks workspace ready once and resolves waiters
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper marks first analysis complete without requiring registry listeners
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper detects stale requests and abort errors
graph view provider analysis lifecycle helper marks workspace ready without requiring a waiting promise
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns plugin statuses after syncing plugin order
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade resolves plugin names using the cached workspace root and vscode workspace folders
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade replaces the cache through the stored-cache helper and logs its messages
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade short-circuits file invalidation when no workspace root exists or no files are provided
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns an empty invalidation set when no file paths are provided even with a workspace root
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade invalidates workspace files and persists only when files were removed from the cache
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns early when plugin invalidation receives no plugin ids
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns early when plugin invalidation has no discovered files
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade returns early when plugin invalidation finds no matching plugins
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade resolves plugin file paths and invalidates them through the shared invalidation flow
pipeline/service/lifecycleFacade disposes the plugin registry
graph view analysis request aborts the previous controller and clears the active request on success
graph view analysis request logs unexpected failures and still clears the active request
graph view analysis request does not log abort failures and still clears the active request
graph view analysis request does not clear the active controller when a newer request replaced it
graph view analysis execution initialize returns true immediately when the analyzer is already initialized
graph view analysis execution initialize returns false when no analyzer exists
graph view analysis execution initialize initializes the analyzer once and clears the cached promise
graph view analysis execution initialize reuses an in-flight analyzer initialization promise
graph view analysis execution initialize returns false when the request turns stale after plugin activation
graph view analysis execution run analyzes the workspace and publishes the transformed graph
graph view analysis execution run drops analyzed graph results when the request turns stale after analyze resolves
graph view analysis execution progress forwards progress updates with the phase label for the current mode
graph view analysis execution progress publishes the initial progress state for indexed modes only
graph view analysis execution progress does not throw when progress handlers omit sendIndexProgress
graph view analysis execution load discovers a disconnected graph when loading without an existing index
graph view analysis execution load analyzes the workspace when loading from an existing index
graph view analysis execution load runs explicit full refresh through the analyzer refresh path
plugin lifecycle notify/analysis calls onPreAnalyze with the shared files payload
plugin lifecycle notify/analysis calls post-analysis hooks when they are present
graph view settings lifecycle helper sends current settings messages without mutating the view context
graph view settings lifecycle helper captures the full settings snapshot, reapplies state, and sends the grouped messages
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle clears the cache and persists the empty state
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle disposes every registered plugin through the registry
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns undefined for plugin names when no workspace root exists
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns undefined for plugin names when no plugin matches the file
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns the plugin name using the cached workspace root
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns the plugin name using the current workspace root when no cached root exists
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns file stat details when the workspace file system succeeds
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns null when workspace file stat lookup fails
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle returns undefined from _getWorkspaceRoot when no workspace folders exist
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle loads the repo-local persisted cache when .codegraphy/graph.lbug already exists
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle reports whether the repo already has an indexed graph
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle clears the repo-local database cache alongside the legacy workspace mirror
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle invalidates only files owned by the selected plugins
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle invalidates the whole discovered repo when a wildcard plugin changes
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle treats an index as stale when plugin or settings signatures no longer match
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle treats an index as stale when the workspace commit has changed since indexing
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle treats an index as stale when a repo index recorded a commit but the current commit cannot be resolved
WorkspacePipeline lifecycle invalidates selected workspace files from the cache and persists the updated cache
pluginLifecycle initializePlugin calls initialize on a plugin that has not been initialized
pluginLifecycle initializePlugin does not call initialize a second time
pluginLifecycle initializePlugin removes plugin from initialized set when initialize throws
pluginLifecycle initializePlugin skips plugins without an initialize method
pluginLifecycle initializeAll initializes all plugins in the map
pluginLifecycle notifyWorkspaceReady calls onWorkspaceReady for each plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyWorkspaceReady skips plugins without onWorkspaceReady
pluginLifecycle notifyPreAnalyze calls onPreAnalyze for each plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyFilesChanged collects additional workspace-relative files requested by plugins
pluginLifecycle notifyFilesChanged requests a full refresh when a matching plugin still only supports pre-analysis hooks
pluginLifecycle notifyPostAnalyze calls onPostAnalyze for each plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyGraphRebuild calls onGraphRebuild for each plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyWebviewReady calls onWebviewReady for each plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyWorkspaceReadyForPlugin calls onWorkspaceReady on the plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyWorkspaceReadyForPlugin handles plugins that throw from onWorkspaceReady
pluginLifecycle notifyWebviewReadyForPlugin calls onWebviewReady on the plugin
pluginLifecycle notifyWebviewReadyForPlugin handles plugins that throw from onWebviewReady
pluginLifecycle replayReadinessForPlugin replays workspace-ready when workspace was previously notified
pluginLifecycle replayReadinessForPlugin replays webview-ready when webview was previously notified
pluginLifecycle replayReadinessForPlugin skips replay when nothing has been notified yet
pluginLifecycle replayReadinessForPlugin replays both when both have been notified
